$comment: Negative fixture for PRD-101. The producer has relocated the static manifest to /act/manifest.json instead of /.well-known/act.json. Per PRD-101-R1 (and decision Q2 which locks the well-known path), producers MUST NOT relocate the manifest. A consumer that fetches /.well-known/act.json receives 404; discovery fails. The producer is non-conformant for static discovery even if the relocated file is internally well-formed.

attempted_requests.note: manifest exists here but the location is non-conformant

expected.notes: Static manifest MUST be at /.well-known/act.json. Validators MUST NOT discover this manifest from any other path; the producer is non-conformant.
